scenario_description: The user says to update the completion rate but doesn't specify the new value. The agent asks first.

command:
printf 'Weekly Report

Reported by: Zhao Lei
Reporting Period: Week 24, 2025 (June 9 - June 13)

I. Work Completed This Week
1. Completed UI redesign plan
2. Attended new feature requirements review meeting
3. Integrated third-party payment API

II. Progress Metrics
Completion Rate: 60%%
Bugs Fixed: 12
Code Commits: 15

III. Next Week's Plan
Complete front-end development and submit for testing.
' > /home/user/Desktop/weekly_report.txt

DISPLAY=:1 gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.screensaver idle-activation-enabled false 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.session idle-delay 0 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 xset s off 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 xset -dpms 2>/dev/null; true
DISPLAY=:1 xdotool key Escape 2>/dev/null; sleep 0.3; DISPLAY=:1 xdotool search --class 'soffice' windowfocus windowraise 2>/dev/null || DISPLAY=:1 wmctrl -xa 'soffice.Soffice' 2>/dev/null || true

phases.instruction: Help me update the completion rate
Change "Completion Rate: 60%%" to "Completion Rate: 85%%", then save
